---
title: "Registration"
---

## Registration process

Registration to the AIML4OS funathon is compulsory. The registration process takes place in two steps:

- First, participants register following the registration link;
- Second, organizers will send an email to participants confirming your registration (around May 10th).

## How to register

You must register in teams of approximately 3 to 5 people. The organizers strongly recommend that you form a team with your colleagues and __book a room where you can all work together in-person__ for the duration of the funathon. This collaborative, in-person aspect is one of the most important features of the funathon (and it's much more fun to work directly with colleagues).

The registration form is (here)[https://grist.numerique.gouv.fr/o/docs/forms/kVB8TszNTEbuuPoquY8ze8/55].
